name: Raisin-Oatmeal Cookies (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the orange in a blender or process it.
2. Add oil, honey, milk, and vanilla to the ground orange; blend until smooth.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, raisins) with the orange mixture. Stir until well blended.
4. Drop or plop spoonfuls of dough onto non-stick cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 300°F for 25-30 minutes.
Note: If your oranges are not very sweet, use only half of the rind.
